items.title: Seven-Year Valve Durability With Transcatheter or Surgical Aortic Valve Replacement: An Ad Hoc Analysis of the PARTNER 3 Randomized Clinical Trial
items.title_zh: PARTNER 3 随机对照试验事后分析:TAVR 与外科主动脉瓣置换的 7 年瓣膜耐久性
items.summary_zh: PARTNER 3 低危主动脉瓣狭窄随机对照试验的事后分析报告了 1000 例患者(TAVR 495 例、外科 SAVR 453 例,71 家美国与加拿大中心,末次随访至 2025 年 3 月)7 年瓣膜耐久性结果:两组全因生物瓣衰败(BVF)发生率相近(TAVR 6.9% vs SAVR 7.3%),主动脉瓣再介入率也相近(6.0% vs 6.7%);TAVR 组血栓相关瓣膜功能障碍更常见(5.2% vs 0.9%),但多发生在早期、可逆,极少进展为瓣膜衰败。研究支持球囊扩张式 SAPIEN 3 瓣膜在低危患者终身瓣膜管理策略中的长期耐久性与外科生物瓣相当。
items.summary_en: An ad hoc 7-year durability analysis of the low-risk PARTNER 3 RCT (1,000 patients — 495 TAVR, 453 SAVR — across 71 US/Canada centers, last follow-up March 2025) found comparable bioprosthetic valve failure (6.9% TAVR vs 7.3% SAVR) and aortic valve reintervention rates (6.0% vs 6.7%) between arms. Thrombosis-related valve dysfunction was more common with TAVR (5.2% vs 0.9%) but was mostly early-onset, reversible, and rarely progressed to failure — supporting comparable long-term durability of the balloon-expandable SAPIEN 3 valve versus surgery for lifetime management in low-risk patients.

items.title: Medical societies take a stand as CMS nears final decision on TAVR proposal
items.title_zh: ACC/SCAI/STS 联合致信 CMS,就 TAVR 国家覆盖决定修订提案表态
items.summary_zh: 随着 CMS 对 TAVR 国家覆盖决定(NCD)修订提案的公众意见征集期于 7 月 15 日结束,美国心脏病学会(ACC)、心血管造影和介入学会(SCAI)与胸外科医师协会(STS)联合致信 CMS,由三学会主席 Roxana Mehran、J. Dawn Abbott 与 Vinay Badhwar 联署,要求保留'心脏团队'多学科评估模式、为仍存在证据缺口的人群维持有限的'证据发展下覆盖'(CED)路径,并主张以机构质量指标而非'僵化的操作者手术量门槛'衡量准入资质。CMS 此前提案拟取消症状性患者的 CED 要求、放宽对介入心脏科与心外科医师同时在场的强制要求,若最终生效将大幅重塑美国 TAVR 准入与质控体系。
items.summary_en: As the public comment period on CMS's proposed revision to the TAVR National Coverage Determination closed July 15, the ACC, SCAI, and STS sent a joint letter to CMS — signed by their presidents Roxana Mehran, J. Dawn Abbott, and Vinay Badhwar — urging preservation of the multidisciplinary Heart Team model, a targeted coverage-with-evidence-development pathway for populations with remaining evidence gaps, and quality-based rather than rigid volume-threshold operator requirements. CMS's proposal would drop CED for symptomatic patients and loosen the requirement for joint interventional cardiologist/surgeon involvement — changes that, if finalized, would reshape TAVR access and oversight nationwide.

items.title: TRiCares Announces Initiation of TRICURE US IDE Pivotal Study for Topaz Tricuspid Valve Replacement System
items.title_zh: TRiCares 启动 TRICURE 美国 IDE 关键性试验:Topaz 经导管三尖瓣置换系统头对头对比 EVOQUE
items.summary_zh: 器械公司 TRiCares 宣布其 TRICURE 美国 IDE 关键性试验完成首例患者入组与治疗,这是首个将在研经导管三尖瓣置换(TTVR)系统与已上市器械头对头随机对照的研究。该前瞻性、全球多中心、1:1 随机试验计划在美国、加拿大与欧洲最多 75 家中心开展,将 TRiCares 的 Topaz TTVR 系统与爱德华兹已上市的 EVOQUE 系统对比;首例患者在亚特兰大 Piedmont 心脏研究所由联合主要研究者 Pradeep Yadav 医生完成治疗。Topaz 采用经股静脉入路的双支架瓣膜设计,用于治疗重度三尖瓣反流。
items.summary_en: TRiCares announced enrollment and treatment of the first patient in its TRICURE US IDE pivotal study — the first randomized head-to-head trial of an investigational TTVR system against a commercially approved device. The prospective, global, multicenter trial will randomize patients 1:1 across up to 75 US, Canadian, and European sites, comparing TRiCares' Topaz transcatheter tricuspid valve replacement system against Edwards' commercially available EVOQUE system; the first patient was treated at Piedmont Heart Institute in Atlanta by co-principal investigator Dr. Pradeep Yadav. Topaz is a transfemoral, two-stent valve prosthesis designed to treat severe tricuspid regurgitation.

items.title: Jenscare wins CE mark for transvenous tricuspid valve replacement
items.title_zh: 杰仕(Jenscare)LuX-Valve Plus 经静脉三尖瓣置换系统获欧盟 CE 认证
items.summary_zh: 中国器械公司杰仕(Jenscare Scientific)宣布其第二代经静脉三尖瓣置换系统 LuX-Valve Plus 获得欧盟 MDR CE 认证,成为全球第二款获批的经导管原位三尖瓣置换(TTVR)系统。该器械采用不依赖径向支撑力的房间隔锚定设计与自适应织物裙边,旨在降低瓣周漏发生率,用于治疗重度三尖瓣反流患者。
items.summary_en: Chinese device maker Jenscare Scientific announced its second-generation transvenous tricuspid valve replacement system, LuX-Valve Plus, has received CE certification under EU MDR, making it the world's second approved transcatheter orthotopic TTVR system. The device uses a radial-force-independent septal anchoring design and a self-adaptive fabric skirt intended to reduce paravalvular leak in patients with severe tricuspid regurgitation.

items.title: ElectroWire Medical Receives 510(k) Clearance for LightningWire Transseptal Puncture System
items.title_zh: ElectroWire Medical 的 LightningWire 经房间隔穿刺系统获 FDA 510(k) 许可
items.summary_zh: 美国器械初创公司 ElectroWire Medical 宣布其 LightningWire 经房间隔穿刺系统获 FDA 510(k) 许可(FDA 于 6 月 26 日批准,公司 7 月中旬公开宣布),适应症为在心脏内建立房间隔通道以引入各类心血管导管。该系统将新型电外科导丝与专用激活电缆结合,可搭配现有经房间隔导入鞘与电外科发生器使用;标称直径 0.032 英寸但刚性设计支持高效的经房间隔通路建立,目标应用覆盖房颤导管消融、左心耳封堵以及经导管二尖瓣修复/置换等快速增长的经房间隔入路手术领域。
items.summary_en: US device startup ElectroWire Medical announced FDA 510(k) clearance (granted June 26, 2026) for its LightningWire transseptal puncture system, indicated for creating an atrial septal access route for introducing cardiovascular catheters. The system pairs a novel electrosurgical guidewire with a dedicated activation cable, compatible with existing transseptal sheaths and electrosurgical generators; despite its 0.032-inch labeled diameter, its stiffer design supports efficient transseptal access — targeting the fast-growing transseptal-access market spanning AFib ablation, LAA occlusion, and transcatheter mitral repair/replacement.
